productDisplayName: Pond's Flawless White Deep Whitening Facial Foam
description: Pond's flawless white Deep Whitening Facial Foam which comes in a tube with a nozzle and rotating cap for closure, visibly brightens up skin, as it cleanses and refreshes, VAO-B³ complex gives a naturally flawless radiant skin, rids skin of dirt, oil and impurities that cause dullness and leaves it soft, smooth and sparkling clean
